_note: Expected outputs authored from the upstream wire format (reference/upstream-codec.js, Apache-2.0): fPort 6 status frame = battery (byte 3, 0.1 V, high bit = low battery) + WorkCount (bytes 4..7, 32-bit BE) mapped to action.motion.count with detected = count > 0. Inputs taken from upstream examples where available; the low-battery and zero-count vectors are synthetic. Device-info frames (reportType 0x00) and config responses (fPort 7) carry no measurement and return errors. downlink unimplemented.

uplink.description: Status report - 18489621 activity events, battery 3.0 V
Status report - zero events (no vibration detected yet), battery 3.6 V
Status report - low battery flag set (high bit), 5 events, 2.5 V
Config report response on fPort 7 - no measurement
